description.leadAfterLogo: was born thanks to a little girl — Mari.
description.paragraph1: MaMarie was born thanks to a little girl — Mari.
description.paragraph2: When I became a mother, I realized that every choice we make for our children becomes part of their childhood. Our colors, our hugs, and the memories we create shape their world.
description.paragraph3: From that idea, MaMarie was born — a brand that believes clothing is more than just clothing. It is the continuation of childhood colors, freedom, comfort, and a mother's love.
description.paragraph4: We want every child to grow up feeling that the world is beautiful, safe, and full of love.
